title: Define repository boundary errors
scenario: Repository failures are infrastructure boundary failures. Keep them distinct from domain rule failures.
instructions: Define RepositoryError with Unavailable and Conflict variants and implement Display.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps boundary-repo-error explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
